title: centaurium erythraea subsp. bernardii
intro: Centaurium erythraea subsp. bernardii, also known as mountain centaury, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the body, making it a popular treatment for anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The plant's health benefits include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote a healthy sleep-wake cycle. Centaurium erythraea subsp. bernardii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often consumed in small doses to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
